campus.name: Dokki Campus
campus.description: Urban campus located near downtown Cairo, serving as AASTMT’s first Cairo-based management education hub.

college.name: College of Management & Technology – Dokki
college.parent_institution: Arab Academy for Science, Technology and Maritime Transport
college.positioning: Comprehensive business and management college focused on applied management education, technology integration, and ethical leadership.
college.vision: To be one of the most reputable Business Management colleges in the Middle East.
college.mission: To provide high-quality management education and training using modern teaching methodologies, strong ethical foundations, and close engagement with society to prepare competent graduates who contribute to economic and social development in the Arab region.

quality_assurance.description: Academic quality maintained through high academic standards, experiential learning, industry placements, and continuous curriculum development.

programs.name: Finance and Accounting
programs.focus: Financial analysis, accounting systems, auditing, taxation, and corporate finance

programs.name: Marketing and International Business
programs.focus: Marketing strategy, international markets, consumer behavior, and global trade

programs.name: Management Information Systems
programs.focus: Business systems, databases, decision support systems, and IT management

programs.name: E-Commerce
programs.focus: Digital business models, online platforms, electronic payment systems, and digital strategy

programs.name: Media Management
programs.focus: Media operations, communication strategy, content management, and media economics

programs.name: Business and Management
programs.focus: General management, organizational behavior, leadership, and strategic management

programs.name: Economics
programs.focus: Microeconomics, macroeconomics, economic analysis, and policy impact

programs.name: Logistics Management
programs.focus: Operations, logistics planning, supply chain fundamentals, and distribution systems

best_for: Students interested in management and leadership
Students who value networking and urban exposure
less_suitable_for: Students seeking heavy engineering or technical specialization
